item.description: Select the language for TMDB results.

item.text: Skip to movie details for single result
item.description: Automatically skip to movie details when only one result is found.

item.text: Red key for TMDB infos in EPGs
item.description: Use the red key to open TMDB infos in EPG screens.
Select the resolution for cover images.
Select the resolution for backdrop images.
Select the preferred resolution for YouTube trailers.
Use Dash MP4 streams for YouTube trailers.
